vocab.meaning: củng cố thể trạng/sức khỏe thể chất
vocab.example: I partake in swimming primarily to fortify my constitution and improve my respiratory health.

vocab.meaning: niềm vui thuần khiết, không pha tạp
vocab.example: Scoring a goal in a high-stakes match brings a sense of unadulterated joy that is hard to replicate elsewhere.

vocab.meaning: được rèn giũa đến mức hoàn hảo
vocab.example: I am fascinated by gymnastics, where every movement is honed to perfection through years of relentless practice.
Tennis is more than just a physical game; it is a battle of wits where you must constantly outthink your opponent.

vocab.meaning: thiên hướng/sự ưa thích đặc biệt cho cái gì
vocab.example: Since my youth, I have had a strong propensity for endurance sports like cycling and long-distance running.
Watching the Olympics represents the pinnacle of achievement in sports, showcasing what the human body is capable of.

vocab.meaning: vận động đến mức đổ mồ hôi (thường dùng để chỉ sự nỗ lực thể chất)
vocab.example: I prefer high-intensity sports where I can really break a sweat and release all my pent-up stress.

vocab.meaning: sự phối hợp giữa tay và mắt
vocab.example: Table tennis is excellent for sharpening your hand-eye coordination and improving your reaction time.

vocab.meaning: khả năng nhận biết vị trí và chuyển động của cơ thể
vocab.example: Sports like rock climbing develop incredible kinesthetic awareness, as you must be mindful of every limb's placement.
The communal spirit found in local amateur football clubs is what makes the sport so endearing to me.
